verse_text: This salutation by my own hand-Paul. Remember my chains. Grace be with you. Amen.

links.context: While Paul is the author of this epistle (1:1), Tertius wrote it down as Paul's secretary. Paul frequently dictated his epistles to a scribe ([[1CO.16:21]]; [[COL.4:18]]; [[2TH.2:17]]; Phm 19).
